info.description: This is the API documentation for the Paradigm: Reboot Prober service.
info.title: Paradigm: Reboot Prober API

get.description: Retrieve play records for a user based on scope (b50, best, all, all-charts)

parameters.description: Filter by difficulty (detected, invaded, massive, reboot)
parameters.name: difficulty

post.description: Batch upload play records for a user

get.description: Retrieve play records for a user scoped to a specific chart. chart_addr can be numeric chart_id or wiki_id:difficulty (e.g. felys:massive).
get.summary: Get play records for a specific chart

get.description: Retrieve play records for a user scoped to a specific song. song_addr can be numeric song_id or wiki_id.
get.summary: Get play records for a specific song

get.description: Retrieve a list of all charts with their details

put.description: Update song details and its charts (Admin only)

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a single song by ID

post.description: Authenticate user and return access and refresh JWT tokens

get.description: Get the profile of the currently authenticated user

put.description: Update the profile of the currently authenticated user

post.description: Generate a new upload token for the current user
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access/refresh token pair
Reset a user's password by admin
